sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16672" key="a)stroskope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρο-σκοπέω</orth>, <sense id="n16672.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">observe the stars,</tr_> <name TEIform="name">E.ap.Satyr.</name> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.Eur.Fr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38 iii 12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
